name: DART-VLN: Test-Time Memory Decay and Anti-Loop Regularization for Discrete Vision-Language Navigation
summary: arXiv:2607.01043v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Memory-based agents for discrete vision-language navigation (VLN) operate under partial observability and can exhibit systematic inference-...
description: arXiv:2607.01043v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Memory-based agents for discrete vision-language navigation (VLN) operate under partial observability and can exhibit systematic inference-time failures even with strong pretrained backbones. We focus on two recurring problems: stale historical evidence during memory readout and inefficient local backtracking during action selection. We...
author: Shaoheng Zhang, Zhichen Li, Jie Mei
